text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, April 11. You have backlog grooming with Greg at 1 PM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Calculating some savings estimates. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Refinancing is a great leverage point. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Space science and tech is a great focus. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: I'm reviewing the scheduling portal specs for Vertex Health. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I checked the recent logs for that. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: I've noted that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. He is doing so well. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Took Lily to her medical checkup. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. That's good medical feedback. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I've indexed the research notes. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Understood. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Here is what I recommend. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! School projects are fun. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Went for a run around the neighborhood. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's good medical feedback. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
